"C:\Program Files\CodeBlocks\MinGW\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\test_runner.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~1\CODEBL~1\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\test_runner.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\test_runner.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~1\CODEBL~1\MinGW\bin\gcc.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\test_runner.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o test_runner.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libtest_runner.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\test_runner.dir\linkLibs.rsp
